record.field: Request for Approval of Customer Registration - ${object.name}

Dear Osama Al Daour ,

Kindly need your approval for the below Customer Registration. Could you please review and approve at your earliest convenience?

Info

  • Customer: ${object.name}
  • Sales Account Manager: ${object.user_id.name}
  • Created By: ${object.create_uid.name}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=beta.partner&menu_id=1237&action=2013

Thank You
Request for Approval of Customer Registration - ${object.name}

Dear Osama Al Daour ,

Kindly need your approval for the below Customer Registration. Could you please review and approve at your earliest convenience?

UAE - Customer Registration Approved by CEO

Dear Team,

Customer registration has been approved, and the customer has been successfully created in the ERP system.

Info

  • Customer: ${object.name}
  • Sales Account Manager: ${object.user_id.name}
  • Created By: ${object.create_uid.name}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=beta.partner&menu_id=1237&action=2013

Thank You
KSA - Customer Registration Approved by CEO

Dear Team,

Customer registration has been approved, and the customer has been successfully created in the ERP system.

Info

  • Customer: ${object.name}
  • Sales Account Manager: ${object.user_id.name}
  • Created By: ${object.create_uid.name}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=beta.partner&menu_id=1237&action=2013

Thank You
UAE - Customer Registration Refused by CEO

Dear ${object.create_uid.name},

Kindly note that your Customer Registration is refused in ERP.

Info

  • Customer: ${object.name}
  • Sales Account Manager: ${object.user_id.name}
  • Created By: ${object.create_uid.name}
  • link: https://erp.betait.net/web#id=${object.id}&view_type=form&model=beta.partner&menu_id=1237&action=2013

Thank You
KSA - Customer Registration Refused by CEO
